name: Roast Beef and Tomato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound thinly sliced cooked roast beef
1 small red onion, thinly sliced, separated into rings
4 teaspoons dry sherry or red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the olive oil, sherry, mustard, salt, pepper, and chopped shallot in a tightly covered container.
2. Place the Boston lettuce on a serving platter. Sprinkle the arugula over the lettuce.
3. Fold the roast beef slices over. Arrange the roast beef, onion rings, and tomato slices on top of the greens.
4. Sprinkle with blue cheese. Serve with vinaigrette.
Yield: 4 servings.
